name: default.cost-optimized
description: Human-editable default queue strategy that minimizes paid-token use while preserving safe routing and reliability.

runtimeFlags.ORCH_URGENT_ONLY: When true, claim/recommend only P0 or urgent tasks.
runtimeFlags.ORCH_CODEX_TOKEN_SAVER: When true, codex-main uses a compact low-token prompt profile.

rules.reason: Use local/free read-only routing for cheap triage before spending paid tokens.
Use free-tier agents for low-risk repo maintenance when available.
Stop rerouting repeated same-cause failures that would burn tokens without progress.
Use the right implementation-capable agent for code edits instead of local read-only routing.
Escalate sensitive, production, or billing work instead of auto-routing.
